title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 50.527 - Revenue defined
text:
50.527.  Revenue defined. — As used in sections 50.525 to 50.745, "revenue" means the ordinary or general revenue to be used for the current expenses of the county regardless of the source from which it is derived.
(RSMo 1939 § 10910, A.L. 1945 p. 610, A.L. 1959 S.B. 64 § 50.530, A.L. 1965 p. 155)
